name: Commonwealth PhD Scholarships
provider: Commonwealth Scholarship Commission in the UK
covers: It funds full tuition fees, return airfare, a monthly living allowance, and study travel grants for doctoral research.
openToRegions: Least developed and fragile Commonwealth countries

name: GREAT Scholarships
provider: British Council and the UK Government
covers: It funds a minimum of ten thousand pounds towards tuition fees for a one year taught master's degree.
openToRegions: Citizens of selected eligible countries

name: Rhodes Scholarships
covers: It funds Oxford University course fees and provides a personal living stipend for postgraduate studies.
openToRegions: Citizens of eligible Rhodes constituencies worldwide

name: Gates Cambridge Scholarships
covers: It funds the full cost of postgraduate study at the University of Cambridge, including tuition fees, a maintenance allowance, and travel.
openToRegions: Citizens of any country outside the United Kingdom

name: Clarendon Fund Scholarships
covers: It funds full tuition fees and provides a generous annual grant for living costs for master's or doctoral students.
openToRegions: International students of all nationalities

name: UCL Global Undergraduate Scholarship
covers: It funds full tuition fees, living costs, or a combination of both for the duration of an undergraduate degree.
openToRegions: International students from low income backgrounds

name: Think Big Undergraduate Scholarships
covers: It funds partial tuition fee discounts of up to thirteen thousand pounds per year for undergraduate studies.
openToRegions: International students classified as overseas for fee purposes

name: Think Big Postgraduate Scholarships
covers: It funds tuition fee discounts of up to twenty six thousand pounds per year for master's degree programmes.
openToRegions: International students classified as overseas for fee purposes

name: Edinburgh Global Research Scholarships
covers: It funds the difference between the tuition fee for a UK graduate student and the higher rate charged to overseas PhD students.
openToRegions: International students applying for a PhD research programme

name: Global Futures Scholarship
covers: It funds tuition fee discounts for international students who are self-funded and holding an admission offer.
openToRegions: International students from eligible countries outside the UK

name: Vice-Chancellor's International Scholarship
covers: It funds tuition fee reductions for international students enrolling in undergraduate or postgraduate taught programmes.
openToRegions: International students from eligible countries outside the UK

name: Developing Solutions Masters Scholarship
covers: It funds fifty percent or one hundred percent of tuition fees for full time master's degree programmes.
openToRegions: Citizens domiciled in Africa, India, or selected Commonwealth countries

name: International Leadership Scholarship
covers: It funds a tuition fee discount of ten thousand pounds for international and EU students.
openToRegions: International and EU students outside the UK

name: President's PhD Scholarships
covers: It funds full tuition fees, a living stipend, and a consumables fund for doctoral research.
openToRegions: High achieving candidates from all nationalities

name: Chancellor's International Scholarships
covers: It funds full payment of overseas tuition fees and a maintenance stipend for doctoral research.
openToRegions: International students assessed as overseas for fee purposes

name: International Undergraduate Scholarship
covers: It funds a tuition fee discount of two thousand five hundred pounds per year for undergraduate studies.
openToRegions: International students classified as overseas for fee purposes

name: Graduate Support Scheme
provider: London School of Economics and Political Science
covers: It funds needs-based financial support ranging from five thousand to fifteen thousand pounds for taught master's programmes.
openToRegions: Diploma and taught master's applicants from all nationalities

name: Westminster International Postgraduate Excellence Award
covers: It funds a tuition fee waiver of three thousand pounds for high-achieving international postgraduate students.
openToRegions: International students from eligible countries outside the UK

name: Chevening Scholarships
covers: Full tuition, a living stipend and travel for a one year masters in the UK.
openToRegions: Over 160 countries and territories

name: Marshall Scholarships
covers: Full funding for high achieving American students to study in the UK.
openToRegions: United States citizens
